title: ResumeBuddy — AI Resume SaaS
description: Built an AI-powered resume platform for ATS analysis, resume improvement, interview preparation, and PDF export. Designed clean, responsive UI and implemented structured workflows for resume creation and user-friendly editing. Optimized backend performance with Redis caching and deployed production-ready services on Vercel + DigitalOcean.

title: NoteAura — AI Note-Taking SaaS
description: Built AI-powered SaaS for note summarization, PDF Q&A, and MCQ generation. Developed a responsive and mobile-friendly interface with scalable AI workflows and modern product design. Integrated LangChain for document processing and Gemini API for intelligent content generation.

title: ClickNBuy — E-Commerce Platform
description: Built a responsive e-commerce application with authentication, cart, orders, and payment workflows. Created reusable frontend components and focused on smooth user flows, usability, and mobile-friendly shopping experience.
